title: CobblemonCQSanimation
description: Custom Animation for Mega Showdown Fan-made (License v2.1 applied)
body:
Custom Animation for Mega Showdown

This is a fan-made resource pack. Licensed under Mega Showdown License v2.1 (assets: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0).

⚠️ IMPORTANT: PUT THIS PACK AT THE TOP OF YOUR RESOURCE PACK LIST FOR ANIMATIONS TO WORK PROPERLY, AND YOU MUST USE THE CORRECT MOVES LISTED UNDER THE "SPECIAL MOVE ANIMATIONS" SECTION BELOW!

✨ Features:
- Custom move animations with smooth effects
- Improved visual experience

🔄 This pack is actively being developed and more animations will be added in future updates.

📦 Requires Minecraft 1.21.1 + Cobblemon + Mega Showdown

Credits:
Mega Showdown by Yajat Kaul and contributors

❗ Non-commercial use only. No selling, monetization, or paywalled content allowed.

I don't accept donations for this project to comply with the original license. If you want to support me, please follow my TikTok:   @didong132465



--------------------------------Special Move Animations:----------------------------

Weather Trio (Groudon, Kyogre, Rayquaza): Feature unique animations for their signature moves:

Groudon: Precipice Blades

Kyogre: Origin Pulse

Rayquaza: Dragon Ascent

Hoopa: Features a custom animation specifically for Special Attack moves.

Greninja: Includes distinct animations for Physical Attacks versus Special Attacks, along with a unique, dedicated animation for Water Shuriken.

Eternatus: Features a specialized animation for its signature move, Dynamax Cannon.

Giratina (Origin Forme): Utilizes separate and distinct animations for Physical and Special Attacks.

Ultra Necrozma: Showcases a breathtaking, high-intensity animation for its ultimate Z-Move, Light That Burns the Sky.

Mega Blaziken: Features custom-made keyframe animations specifically for Physical Attacks. 

Mega Sceptile: Features custom-made keyframe animations for both Physical and Special Attacks.


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

👥 Guest Animator Credits

A huge thank you to Hetaro-kun (Discord: hetarokun, TikTok: @hetaro02) for contributing his own independent Pokémon animations to help me complete this pack sooner, and for helping me out with filming TikTok videos!

If you appreciate a clean, snappy, and decisive animation style without unnecessary flash or over-the-top effects, you are going to absolutely love his work. Here are the specific Pokémon and moves he crafted for this pack:

- Mega Charizard X: Includes a custom animation for Dragon Claw.

- Mega Lucario: Features unique animations for Bone Rush and Aura Sphere.
